originalMatch.explanation: Your resume covers 3/4 required skills and aligns with 2 core responsibilities. Seniority reads as mid. Biggest gaps: on-call, observability. Keyword overlap with the JD is moderate.

tailoredMatch.explanation: Tailored bullets surface REST/API and stakeholder language where truthful. Remaining gaps should not be invented.

tailoredResume.tailoredSummary: Software engineer with experience shipping TypeScript/React features, optimizing Node.js APIs backed by PostgreSQL, and partnering with product on incremental delivery.

bullets.original: Shipped customer-facing features using React and TypeScript.
bullets.tailored: Delivered customer-facing features with React and TypeScript, partnering with stakeholders on incremental releases aligned to roadmap priorities.
bullets.changeReason: Surface stakeholder collaboration language from the JD without changing facts.

bullets.original: Improved API latency by optimizing database queries.
bullets.tailored: Reduced API latency by optimizing PostgreSQL queries and REST request handling paths, improving production performance.
bullets.changeReason: Name the database and REST context explicitly where supported by resume evidence.

bullets.original: Collaborated with product on roadmap planning for quarterly releases.
bullets.tailored: Partnered with product stakeholders to clarify requirements and plan quarterly releases with measurable delivery milestones.
bullets.changeReason: Align phrasing with JD responsibility language while preserving scope.

bullets.original: Built internal tooling scripts in Node.js for data migration tasks.
bullets.tailored: Built Node.js internal tooling to support data migration and integration workflows with testable scripts.
bullets.changeReason: Emphasize integrations/testing keywords where the original work supports it.
bullets.riskFlag: Integration scope inferred from migration context — verify before use.
